# 비정부 출연기관 패널 데이터 분석 {.unnumbered}
# Panel Data Analysis of Non-Government Owned Research Institutes {.unnumbered}
Updated in 2026-03-31

## Citation

채충일. (준비 중). *투고 예정*.

## Abstract

> 본 연구는 한국 공공기관 패널 데이터를 활용하여 비정부 출연기관의 특성과 성과를 분석하는 패널 데이터 분석 연구입니다.

## Planning

### Schedule
- tba

### Progress
- 초기화 단계

## Authorship and Authors

### Author Contribution

- Supervision: Chungil (Chad) Chae
- Project administration:
  - Chungil (Chad) Chae
- Conceptualization:
  - Chungil (Chad) Chae
-  Data acquisition:
   - Chungil (Chad) Chae
-  Data curation:
   - Chungil (Chad) Chae
-  Formal analysis:
  - Chungil (Chad) Chae
- Investigation:
  - Chungil (Chad) Chae
- Methodology:
  - Chungil (Chad) Chae
- Resources:
- Validation:
- Visualization:
- Writing – original draft:
  - Chungil (Chad) Chae
- Writing – review & editing:
  - Chungil (Chad) Chae



### Authors

#### Chungil Chae, Ph.D., M.S.

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="70%"}
- chadchae\@gmail.com
- orcid: [000-0002-7364-1525](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-7364-1525)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=c4lRBrkAAAAJ&hl=en)
- @chadchae

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](img/chadchae.png)
:::


::::

> Chungil Chae @chadchae is an assistant professor in the field of business analytics, with a distinguished track record in organizational behavior, human resource development (HRD), learning, and development.

### Acknowledgement

-   tba

## Declaration

### IRB

### Funding

### AI
